reasoning: The button core is well-harmonized with the Echoes-tuned palette: candy-pink heart, warm amber/orange wing feathers, golden-amber border ring, cream highlight interior, and parchment-tan UI cubes all read as bright and warm. Small pink sphere accents reinforce the candy-pink/sunset-orange axis cleanly. However, the preview panel backgrounds use near-pure charcoal gray and near-black (cold neutral darks) rather than the specified colored darks (deep teal, plum, warm brown). This violates the 'NEVER pure black/grey' shadow rule and drags the overall image mood toward grim/cold. One small blue-tinted square element introduces a cold accent inconsistent with the warm palette. The button asset itself would score 8-9 in isolation; the cold background treatment pulls the overall verdict to marginal (7).
